phases.section: Phase 1 + Phase 2 baseline build (preparation for upgrade)

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 returned 0; phase1_architecture initialized in process-state.json.

tests.name: all_phase1_steps_complete
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) marked complete via --complete-step.

tests.name: build_loop_feature_recorded
tests.details: uat-feat-1 driven through tests_written → tests_verified_failing → implemented → security_audit (with stub findings file) → documentation_updated → feature_recorded; build-progress.json features_completed = ['uat-feat-1']; baseline reached for upgrade.

tests.name: git_commit_with_active_loop_succeeds
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 build-loop steps complete (BL-006 not violated).

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json BEFORE running upgrade-project.sh --to-production; upgrade exited RC=1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision.' PR #17 U-F fix confirmed.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: After clearing the sentinel, upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited 0. Detected POC mode 'sponsored poc' from phase-state.json (PR #17 U-E fix path active). Updated phase-state.json, tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md, appended audit entry to APPROVAL_LOG.md, created chore(upgrade) commit.

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .current_phase remained 0; .project remained 'uat-agent-75'; .track remained 'full'; .deployment remained 'organizational'. poc_mode was removed (expected — POC constraints lifted on transition to production).

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed unchanged ['uat-feat-1']; build_loop reset state preserved (was already reset post feature_recorded).

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output enumerated next steps: 'Review CLAUDE.md for any remaining POC references' and 'Review PROJECT_INTAKE.md Section 8 governance fields'. Verification phase listed Release pipeline TODOs and Intake completeness warning.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: Header of scripts/upgrade-project.sh contains BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25) changelog entries (also BL-016).

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade stdout/stderr for __PROJECT_NAME__, __PLATFORM__, __LANGUAGE__, __TRACK__ found zero hits.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Pattern grep for password/api_key/secret/token quoted-value forms in committed files returned zero hits. Plain word matches were prose in framework reference docs (e.g., builders-guide.md, security-scan-guide.md).

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log not present; no FORCE/reset events occurred during run, which is the expected condition for absence.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $PROJECT_DIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD remained d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches captured starting SHA). git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked entries (.claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) which were already present at sweep start.

summary: Upgrade agent (sponsored_poc → production, desktop, full) — init non-interactive, baseline build, BL-015 sentinel block, upgrade-project.sh --to-production all passed; PR #17 U-E/U-F/U-H and PR #18 framework-self guard confirmed working; no regressions found.
